chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2658 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي اَلْمُحْرِمِ تَشَقَّقُ يَدَاهُ فَقَالَ «يَدْهُنُهُمَا بِزَيْتٍ أَوْ سَمْنٍ أَوْ إِهَالَةٍ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2658 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from one of the Imams (as) regarding a Muhrim whose hands have cracked.
Imam (as) said: "He may anoint them with oil, fat, or melted fat (ihalah)."
